description:
Cargo.toml line 21 declares `zeroize = { workspace = true }`, but src/lib.rs never imports or uses zeroize/Zeroize/Zeroizing. SecretValue zeroization is handled inside secretx-core (Drop impl on SecretValue). The `String` returned by aws_sdk_ssm is in non-zeroizing memory before this code sees it (same constraint as secretx-aws-sm — see its module-level doc comment).

Fix: remove zeroize from [dependencies] in secretx-aws-ssm/Cargo.toml. Identical to 8bh8.2 for secretx-aws-sm.

Verification: `grep -n -i zeroize secretx-aws-ssm/src/lib.rs` returns nothing.
title: secretx-aws-ssm: zeroize declared as dependency but never used in source
